work_unit: Meta-audit: audit-cycle-state merged-status consistency vs main branch
situation: audit-cycle-state.status=cycle-complete with all derived_fixes marked merged. Workspace saturated (all 14 git projects audited ≥1×). Triggered new full audit cycle targeting meta-engine consistency.
action: Deep meta-audit verifying derived_fixes[].status=merged declarations against actual main-branch content. Cross-referenced worktree HEAD commits, squash-merge paths, and structural-debt.md SD ID sets.
outcome_evidence: H-META-039-001: git diff main..eb0a30e/93872a4/4948ff1 shows unmerged changes; git grep SD-007 main:.claude/structural-debt.md returns 0 matches. M-META-039-002: git log -S _atomic_write_json shows 919ecd2 (not 365ab4f) introduced the function on main via 8027379.
next_suggestion: 派生 H-META-039-001 fix: 开新 worktree materialize 7 phantom SDs (SD-007,SD-009..SD-017) 到 structural-debt.md，走 opt-worktree.sh commit
派生 M-META-039-002 fix: 更新 audit-cycle-state DW-CORE-M-001 _note 引用正确 merge path (919ecd2/8027379)
清理 3 个未合并 worktree (opt-structural-debt/opt-audit/opt-audit-cycle) 在 fix 落地后

audit_findings.finding: H-META-039-001: 3 worktree commits (eb0a30e/93872a4/4948ff1) for structural-debt phantom SD materialization declared merged but never entered main. 7 SD IDs (SD-007,SD-009..SD-017) missing from main's structural-debt.md.
audit_findings.remediation: Fresh worktree to append 7 phantom SD entries to structural-debt.md + merge via opt-worktree.sh

audit_findings.finding: M-META-039-002: DW-CORE-M-001 _note cites non-merged worktree 365ab4f as fix vehicle; actual merge was 919ecd2→8027379. Evidence chain broken though fix substantively present on main.
audit_findings.remediation: Update _note to reference correct merge path; mark opt-skills-1783380367 as superseded
